# Adjacent SSOT Contracts

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/providerruntimeboundarydocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to runtime actor boundary](../runtime-actor-boundary.md)

| Adjacent SSOT | Boundary call / delegation / requirement |
| --- | --- |
| public `riido-contracts/docs/20-domain/provider-capability.md` (C3) | `Provider.Capability()` returns C3 `ProviderCapability`; capability changes belong to C3. |
| public `riido-contracts/docs/20-domain/ir-event-log.md` (C2) | Adapter draft `Type` must be registered in the event catalog; append authority stays separated. |
| public `riido-contracts/docs/20-domain/ir-schema-versioning.md` | Adapter may fill only allowed draft fields; ingest finalizes required event fields. |
| public `riido-contracts/docs/20-domain/task-lifecycle.md` (C1) | Adapter does not decide transitions; ingest/orchestrator interprets run signals. |
| `docs/20-domain/runtime-scheduling.md` (C5) | One provider instance, one lease, and one `(RuntimeID, CapabilityFingerprint)` pair. |
| `docs/20-domain/workspace.md` (C6) | Adapter reads prepared workdir/native config; C6 creates workdirs first. |
| `docs/20-domain/security.md` (C7) | `ExposesUnsafePermissionBypass` is a risk signal; C7 policy decides activation. |
| `docs/30-architecture/compatibility-gate.md` | G5 pre-execute handshake calls adapter initialize/firstline probes before lease activation. |
| `docs/30-architecture/runtime-upgrade-flow.md` | Runtime identity, capability drift, and reserved upgrade evidence are delegated there. |
